steps.script: () => { return { url: location.href, title: document.title, hasPassword: !!document.querySelector('input[type=password]'), onFlows: /\/flows/.test(location.href) && !/login/.test(location.href), snippet:(document.body.innerText||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').slice(0,160) }; }
